gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT (radeonsi, navi22, LLVM 20.1.8, DRM 3.64, 6.17.1-arch1-1)
notes: The game installed fine through Steam. It went through the process of installing the EA App, having me login, and then attempting to launch the game. Before the initial anti-cheat was loaded, it gave an error window saying "Error: The program encourntered E111000B at 00002302 during initialization. Wine, Proton, and Steam Deck are not supported by this application!", then lets you click OK and it closes the game.
title: EA SPORTS FC™ 26
